description: Home Assistant configuration project. Full autonomy — all service calls and state checks allowed. No computer-use.

tool_chain.purpose: Open HA frontend URL (default: http://homeassistant.local:8123; override via profile.json)
Verify dashboard loads, check entity states and card rendering
Execute JS state checks and verify entity values in the HA frontend
Trigger HA service calls to verify automation and script behavior
Set viewport to iPhone SE (375x667) and capture dashboard visual layout
Set viewport to Pixel 7 / Android phone (393x851) and capture dashboard visual layout
Set viewport to iPad (768x1024) and capture dashboard visual layout
Set viewport to Galaxy Tab S9 / Android tablet (800x1280) and capture dashboard visual layout
Set viewport to Desktop (1280x800) and capture dashboard visual layout
